---
title: "Decision, Risk and AI"
subtitle: "Daily static macro desk built from public data"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<style>
.dashboard-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  min-width: 880px;
}

.dashboard-table th,
.dashboard-table td {
  padding: 0.8rem 0.85rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(25, 48, 56, 0.1);
  vertical-align: middle;
}

.dashboard-table thead th {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.table-scroll {
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.table-note,
.snapshot-meta {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.scenario-bars {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.85rem;
}

.scenario-bar-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, 1.3fr) minmax(0, 4fr) auto;
  gap: 0.9rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.scenario-bar-label,
.scenario-bar-value {
  font-weight: 700;
}

.scenario-bar-track {
  position: relative;
  height: 14px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(18, 73, 91, 0.12);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.scenario-bar-fill {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0 auto 0 0;
  border-radius: inherit;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-green), var(--accent));
}

.scenario-subvalue {
  margin: 0.35rem 0 0;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.scenario-positive {
  color: var(--accent-green);
}

.scenario-negative {
  color: #b45309;
}

.scenario-neutral {
  color: var(--muted);
}

.sparkline {
  width: 160px;
  height: 42px;
  display: block;
}

.lag-table td.lag-match {
  background: rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.12);
  color: var(--accent-green);
  font-weight: 700;
}

.lag-table td.lag-miss {
  background: rgba(180, 83, 9, 0.12);
  color: var(--accent-warm);
  font-weight: 700;
}

.lag-table td.lag-na {
  color: var(--muted);
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .scenario-bar-row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="surface">
<p class="eyebrow">New research platform</p>
<h2>U.S. macro scenario monitoring with energy, geopolitics, and explicit lag logic</h2>
<p>This page is the public-facing output of a daily static macro desk. It uses public market and macro series, an explicit scenario engine, and lagged event checks to show how a live shock propagates through rates, credit, inflation compensation, FX, and equities.</p>
<div class="hub-link-row"><a href="generated/snapshot.json">Snapshot JSON</a><a href="generated/signal_dashboard.csv">Signal dashboard CSV</a><a href="generated/lag_check.csv">Lag-check CSV</a></div>
</div>

{{< include generated/decision_risk_ai_snapshot.md >}}
